Job description

Part-Time IT Intern (Temp to Hire Opportunity)
Location: Madison Heights, MI
Pay:  Starts at $18/hour
Schedule: Flexible start date, scheduling within Monday-Friday between the hours of 8:30AM-5:00PM
Job Type: Part-Time Summer Internship with potential for permanent placement

About the Company:

Cochrane Supply is an award-winning, internationally recognized technology company distributing Building Automation and IIoT products. Since 1967, our family-owned company has been a trusted partner in delivering cutting-edge control solutions for comfort, safety, and security in commercial buildings. With 12 branches across North America, we offer an unmatched combination of inventory, expert support, and industry-leading training to help integrators and contractors stay ahead in a rapidly evolving market.

About the Role:

Join our Internal IT team for the summer and gain hands-on experience exploring AI-assisted software development and automation. This internship focuses on researching and testing emerging AI tools, evaluating how they can improve internal processes, and helping prototype practical solutions that support internal systems and workflows.

This position begins as a temporary summer internship, with the potential to grow based on performance, fit, and business needs.

 

Key Responsibilities:

Research and evaluate emerging AI-assisted development tools and platforms.
Test and experiment with agent-based workflows and automation concepts for internal processes.
Assist in prototyping internal tools or scripts that improve operational efficiency.
Explore integrations between internal systems and AI tools to support workflow automation.
Document findings, test results, and recommended use cases to support future IT initiatives.
Perform other duties as assigned.
 

What We’re Looking For:

Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field
Interest in AI-assisted development tools, automation, and emerging AI workflows
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
Comfortable experimenting with new technologies and documenting findings
Able to work both independently and collaboratively within a technical team
Curious, proactive, and eager to explore practical applications of AI in internal software tools and processes
 

What We Offer:

Flexible start date to accommodate your schedule
$18/hour paid internship
Hands-on experience in a professional purchasing environment
Opportunity for permanent placement following the internship period
Supportive and collaborative company culture

Cochrane Supply & Engineering was founded in 1967 and has grown into an award-winning, internationally recognized Smart Building Controls Distributor. Cochrane Supply is proud to be your source of building automation systems, HVAC controls, smart building technology, and building controls and services. With a best-in-class tech support team and dedicated training division, Cochrane Supply provides the resources and tools to help contractors, systems integrators, facility managers, and engineers optimize their success in the industry.
